inputs.label: Hot Inlet Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Temperature of hot fluid entering the heat exchanger.

inputs.label: Hot Outlet Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Temperature of hot fluid leaving the heat exchanger.

inputs.label: Cold Inlet Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Temperature of cold fluid entering the heat exchanger.

inputs.label: Cold Outlet Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Temperature of cold fluid leaving the heat exchanger.

inputs.label: Flow Arrangement (1=Counterflow, 2=Parallel)
inputs.businessContext: Heat exchanger flow configuration. Use 1 for counterflow, 2 for parallel flow.
